title: Load shedding returns: Eskom announces power cuts for Saturday night
description: LOAD SHEDDING NEWS - Eskom has put a damper...
bodyText:
LOAD SHEDDING NEWS - Eskom has put a damper on South Africans’ weekend by announcing that load shedding will be returning.


> Stage 3 load shedding


The power utility said stage 3 load shedding will be implemented from 17:30 on Saturday.

“Following over 20 days of uninterrupted electricity supply, Eskom has encountered another temporary setback,” it said.

“As a result, Stage 3 load shedding will be implemented from today at 17:30 until further notice.”

Eskom did not say how long the load shedding will be in place but did state it will give an update on Sunday.

For schedules on Load Shedding follow the latest updates on EskomSePush.

Source: Caxton publication, The Citizen

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
